scripts.minify:css: cleancss -o css/styles.min.css css/styles.css && cleancss -o css/admin.min.css css/admin.css && cleancss -o css/batch.min.css css/batch.css && cleancss -o css/kiosk.min.css css/kiosk.css
scripts.concat:js: cat js/modules/01-config.js js/modules/02-utils.js js/modules/03-events.js js/modules/04-label-cards.js js/modules/05-catalog-view.js js/modules/06-featured.js js/modules/07-catalog-kits.js js/modules/08-catalog-ingredients.js js/modules/09-catalog-services.js js/modules/10-tabs.js js/modules/11-cart.js js/modules/12-checkout.js js/modules/13-init.js > js/main.js
scripts.minify:js: npm run concat:js && terser js/main.js -o js/main.min.js -c -m && terser js/admin.js -o js/admin.min.js -c -m && terser js/batch.js -o js/batch.min.js -c -m && terser js/kiosk.js -o js/kiosk.min.js -c -m
scripts.stamp:admin: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let f=fs.readFileSync('admin.html','utf8');const v=Date.now().toString(36);f=f.replace(/styles\.min\.css\?v=[^\"]+/,'styles.min.css?v='+v);f=f.replace(/admin\.min\.css\?v=[^\"]+/,'admin.min.css?v='+v);f=f.replace(/admin\.min\.js\?v=[^\"]+/,'admin.min.js?v='+v);fs.writeFileSync('admin.html',f);console.log('admin.html cache version updated to '+v);"
scripts.stamp:kiosk: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let f=fs.readFileSync('kiosk.html','utf8');const v=Date.now().toString(36);f=f.replace(/kiosk\.min\.css\?v=[^\"]+/g,'kiosk.min.css?v='+v);f=f.replace(/kiosk\.min\.js\?v=[^\"]+/g,'kiosk.min.js?v='+v);fs.writeFileSync('kiosk.html',f);console.log('kiosk.html cache version updated to '+v);"
scripts.build: npm run stamp && npm run stamp:sw && npm run stamp:admin && npm run stamp:kiosk && npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
